arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo, Messi, Lewandowski: Barcelona striker joins exclusive Champions League club
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski has joined Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi an exclusive Champions League club after scoring an early penalty in Barcelona’s home game against Brest on Tuesday. Ronaldo leads the way with 140 goals in 183 appearances, followed by Messi, who netted 129 times in 163 games.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick leaves Barcelona fans disappointed with starting XI to face Brest
arts.sum: One inclusion in Barcelona’s starting line-up to face Stade Brestois on Tuesday has given rise to widespread unrest amongst the club’s supporters. This comes amid confirmation that Gerard Martín will…

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea 'handed Barcelona problem' in pursuit of Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly deal a blow to Arsenal and Chelsea's hopes of signing Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Barcelona could include player in deal for Viktor Gyökeres
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are giving consideration to making use of a prior deal with Sporting CP to reduce the cost of the potential signing of Viktor Gyökeres. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Messi and Mascherano’s incredible success with Barcelona and Argentina in numbers
arts.sum: Javier Mascherano has replaced Gerardo “Tata” Martino as the new head coach of MLS team Inter Miami, which will see him take charge of a number of his former Barcelona teammates, including Lionel Messi and Luis Suárez. The duo won an Olympic gold medal together at the 2008 Games in Beijing but later suffered a number of disappointments together, losing the 2014 FIFA World Cup final to Germany, as well as three Copa América finals (2007, 2015 and 2016).

arts.ttl: Mascherano appointed as new Inter Miami coach
arts.sum: Inter Miami confirmed that former Liverpool, Barcelona and Argentina defender Javier Mascherano will take over as the team's new coach.

arts.ttl: Barcelona considering ingenious way to lower asking price of Viktor Gyokeres
arts.sum: Barcelona are looking to the striker market ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window, as they aim to secure the services of Robert Lewandowski’s successor. In recent months, the name of Viktor Gyokeres has featured prominently amongst the speculation, with the Swedish striker having already amassed 33 goals for club and country this season. arts.ttl: Why isn’t Lamine Yamal playing for Barcelona against Brest? Hansi Flick’s ‘setback’ injury update
arts.sum: Of the 15 games in which Yamal started this season, Barcelona have won 14. Barcelona will be without teenage sensation Lamine Yamal as they host Brest in the Champions League on Tuesday.
